column1: Trea Turner headlines today's Beat The Streak picks, leading off for Colorado in a hitter-friendly park and sporting a rock-solid 73% hit probability—exactly the kind of steady bat to anchor any streak. Jonathan Aranda grabs the next spot, batting second with a favorable lefty-vs-righty matchup and a reliable approach that keeps him in the mix for a knock every night. Yandy Diaz and Brendan Donovan also offer appealing top-of-order roles, each bringing a trustworthy profile and strong recent trends, but Turner’s combination of matchup, lineup spot, and park edge puts him a cut above the rest.
